feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Hello, this is Andy at Shit-fil-a, do you have a take away order?
entry.content: Hello, this is Andy at Shit-fil-a, do you have a take away order?

entry.title: /int/ International: Events this time of year.
entry.content: England has the Gilbert and Sullivan Festival, Ireland has Fleadh Cheoil na hÉireann, and America has the Gathering of the Juggalos, but do they have something like that IN GERMANY? I propose a German military march and soldier song festival where they sing Erika and other Potpourri - I couldn’t find any upon Googling it.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >/g/ makes a 21st album Theme: Wizard music Title: Lennart Poettering and the Go…
entry.content: >/g/ makes a 21st album Theme: Wizard music Title: Lennart Poettering and the Goblet of Onions Deadline: Sat 1st of August Listening party: Sat 8th of August, 22:00UTC >/g/ makes a 22nd album Theme: remixes, remakes, and music based on previous /dmp/ songs. (5th anniversary special) >How to submit a song for the album You can upload audio here without a login: https://catbox.moe/ https://dmpproductions.org/mediaboa rd?thread=14 Other services can be used, as long as the download is publicly acce
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: In Brazil, July 16 is the kissing holiday
entry.content: Girls go up to men and give them a kiss on the cheek. Then the guy has to hold her hand over her head and spin her around three times saying "Kisser kisser beautiful girl, I'll spin you around and make you blush!" if she's blushing by the end he can pick her up and kiss her until she hits the top of his head three times. If she's not blushing then he has to run away and she has to chase him or say "runner runner I didn't blush now I'm gone and you're a husk" It's a really cute way to fall in lov
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Androgynous character design
entry.content: Am I the only person bothered by the amount of androgynous characters in contemporary video games? I'm not trying to be hateful or anything. It's just...when I was a teenager who played good ol' games on my Xbox, most of the protags were masculine guys like Marcus Fenix, Riddick and Rico Rodriguez...men we boys could look up to, and female characters were like Nina Williams, hot girls with nice busty bodies. Don't get me wrong, I'm not saying every man should look like Vin Diesel or somerthing,
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: I suffer in the UK. I don't like the UK cadence at all, or how the air looks. I …
entry.content: I suffer in the UK. I don't like the UK cadence at all, or how the air looks. I am also worried about the state of censorship and the things they are doing to the digital sector of our world. The only place I could move to is the US, which I find to be more geographically and aesthetically pleasing in some areas, but it still has a lot of the same problems as the UK in terms of censorship. There are also a lot of guns and crazy political discourse, but it is a strong contender for where I would
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

It’d rather be there than this shithole

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Nintendo will have a monopoly on store shelf space
entry.content: Soon every store you enter will only sell switch games. Nintendo is going to have a monopoly on store shelf space Children will grow up without knowing what a playstation is. Is giving up on physical going to hurt sony in the long term?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: OpenBSD is difficult to install
entry.content: I've been trying to install OpenBSD on my pc because modern linux is controlled by big tech and OpenBSD seemed like the goldilocks zone of operating systems. I've been using linux for about 4 years now so i thought i was ready to make the switch. What annoys me is that they didn't make a regular base system that is configured post-install. You pick sets from the installer. This absolutely breaks my ventoy setup and I keep getting it wrong on my secondary flash drive. Am i holding it wrong?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: SUZUKI TU250 (GN125 evolution) >Motorcycle tips and tricks >Motorcycle pics, webms and streamables >Tips to keep your fumo soft >Milkcrate mounting solutions >rip gn, gaymoo, indian >BTFU (back the fuck up) technique >Motorcycle anime girls >Cb500 leg legion association guild >tennyfren HQ >Motorcycle izzat >T.nogf posting Make Frens!: (New map! Email dbtmap3@gmail.com with pic of bike (hosted) and location to be added): >https://www.google.com/maps/d/u/0/ viewer?hl=en∣=1oTvWWrLIUa0wWsds9 QQdGms

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The Gunburgers routinely celebrate their liberation from the British Empire, but…
entry.content: The Gunburgers routinely celebrate their liberation from the British Empire, but at the same time, they routinely fap themselves blind over this English domina archetype that appears again and again in their videogames. Why is that? Is it some sort of perverse national masochism?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: What's the deal with film depicting hangings as being via asphyxiation rather th…
entry.content: What's the deal with film depicting hangings as being via asphyxiation rather than strangulation or ideally breaking the neck? It seems like it's to such an extent that people generally don't know the purpose of a gallows and the suicidal have no concept of how to make a clean exit.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /int/ International: Find out who the father arrested for killing his son for not saying "good mornin…
entry.content: Find out who the father arrested for killing his son for not saying "good morning" is. American missionary Dandre Jermaine Grayson has lived in Brazil for nine years. He and the child's mother are being held in pretrial detention. Dandre Jermaine Grayson , an American missionary who beat his 3-year-old son to death, dedicated his life to religion in Viamão, Rio Grande do Sul. The man confessed to the murder and has been in pre-trial detention since Sunday (July 5), when the crime occurred. He be
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Romances is what keeps your game in the mind of gamers. Good mechanics and story…
entry.content: Romances is what keeps your game in the mind of gamers. Good mechanics and story might sell a game. But a Rose with thorns you can tame will build fandoms. Had Obsidian learned this lesson they could've kept their independence instead of begging for scraps from their masters table.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I'm gonna be honest with you guys. I have no idea what X or Xorg or X11 or Wayla…
entry.content: I'm gonna be honest with you guys. I have no idea what X or Xorg or X11 or Wayland or whatever the fuck are, or why people get so heated up about them. Only that occasionally some program doesn't werk so I'll have to do command line tricknology to run it with the other, which makes it werk for some reason
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: >Only controlled the islands for 10 years between 1820 and 1830 >First British c…
entry.content: >Only controlled the islands for 10 years between 1820 and 1830 >First British colony was set up 50 years prior >Has been administered and populated by Britain since 1830 >Literally zero historical connection to it >Zero Argentinian population on the Island >No famous Argentinian born there >No famous Argentinian building was ever built there >One failed invasion in the 80s >Even Spain or France have a more legitimate claim over the islands This is like if Russia started to claim the Faroese...
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Declaration
entry.content: I address everyone. My name remains hidden, for a name is a chain before a crown. I was born in 2001, in the year when towers became smoke and the sky learned the shape of falling. I was born in the north, born from Islam, beneath the warning of the Dajjal: the one-eyed mirror, the lie dressed as mercy, the trial that calls itself salvation. What is Will?—A name? No. A decree. The power in man that says what is not shall become, and what shall become has reached backward to summon its beginning.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: Welcome to the /v/ UT/DR Safari. The rules here are simple: we link and observe /v/ UT/DR threads including various stealth threads and thread takeovers. Do NOT post in the linked threads. Do NOT bump them, raid them, or bait them. We are merely here to observe. Current active specimen: >>>/v/743413408 >>>/v/743413436 deliberate threads >>>/v/743403694 now mostly abandoned attempted thread takeover with a bunch of sometimes deleted posts about the whole moderation situation around this game on /

entry.title: /g/ Technology: ROCm 7.14: TheRock Goes Production
entry.content: New production rocm just dropped and that also means the latest amdgpu driver and mesa (26.1.3) in repo.radeon.com This feels like a milestone release where they did a lot of work on the backend that's going to make it much easier to implement things and compete with cuda going forward. https://www.phoronix.com/news/AMD-R OCm-7.14 https://rocm.blogs.amd.com/ecosyste ms-and-partners/rocm-7.14-blog/READ ME.html Also, new installer that works without an OS package manager. On the blog: #simplified
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: When did the decline of Japanese electronics and technologies begin? 20 years ag…
entry.content: When did the decline of Japanese electronics and technologies begin? 20 years ago, companies like Sony, Panasonic, Toshiba, Hitachi, Sharp, Sanyo, Seiko Epson, Casio, Hitachi, Olympus, Seiko, Sharp, NEC, Yamaha etc dominated the electronics industry but today they are a mere shell of what they used to be like >refrigerators, washmachines, vacuums, batteries, and air conditioners >Laundry machines, including washer-dryers >lithium-ion and flash memory your phone uses were created by Japanese >Hit
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /news/ News: Based Democrats vote to cut funding for Israel
entry.content: https://www.politico.com/news/2026/ 07/15/israel-aid-vote-house-democra ts-00999917 Nearly half of House Democrats voted to cut off aid to Israel Wednesday, underscoring a seismic shift in political support for the longtime U.S. ally. The amendment to a State Department spending bill would have eliminated $3.3 billion in funding, and thanks to strong Republican support for the Jewish state, it failed 314-104 . But the vote served as a moment of reckoning for House Democrats who have had to confr
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /g/ Technology: If the RTX 6080 doesn't beat the RTX 5090 then the 60 series will be yet another…
entry.content: If the RTX 6080 doesn't beat the RTX 5090 then the 60 series will be yet another complete disappointment on top of RTX 40 and 50. GPU tech as we know it might be actually DEAD if RTX 60 doesn't deliver. Maybe AMD can save the next generation by having a card that beats the 4090 at least?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I basedfaced when I saw all the scenes & characters from Type Help finally pictu…
entry.content: I basedfaced when I saw all the scenes & characters from Type Help finally pictured from my imagination after a couple repeat playthroughs of the original. The voice-acting is incredible, and the sound design really adds to the atmosphere. A big improvement over the silent terminal interface. It seems like the deduction is more rail-roaded compared to the original, though.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: It's time to create a new world. We just need 3 strikes. I'm waiting for the fir…
entry.content: It's time to create a new world. We just need 3 strikes. I'm waiting for the first strike No pain, no sorrow that world will have. All you will disappear, my friends. From Earth, it will last nothing. I'm the only one who can create and destroy. I hope that I fight all the five knights of the apocalypse and kill Lucifer and defeat God, so that I'm conceded the power of creation. We're/I'm going to live in a happier world without pain and sorrow. I promise.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /int/ International: >Jason Salesberry, a US Navy veteran, had never set foot on Italian soil before …
entry.content: >Jason Salesberry, a US Navy veteran, had never set foot on Italian soil before moving there in October 2017. >Jason says he had grown increasingly concerned about violent crimes in Chesapeake, Virginia, where the family had been living since 2009. He feels that Naples provides a safer environment for his daughter, now 10. >Today, he owns a house in a hilltop town and is planning the harvest from his two-acre grove of olive trees. Why are so many Americans moving to Europe?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.dc:creator: /int/ International
